Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents an employee within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Employee entity.

employmentStartDate.description: The date the employee started employment.

notes.description: Notes or additional information about the employee.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: Represents an expense incurred by an employee.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

date.description: The date the expense was incurred.

notes.description: Notes or description of the expense.

MonthlyReport.title: MonthlyReport
MonthlyReport.description: Represents a monthly expense report for an employee.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MonthlyReport entity.

month.description: The month the report is for (e.g., YYYY-MM).

totalExpenses.description: The total expenses for the employee for the month.

ArchivedExpenseList.title: ArchivedExpenseList
ArchivedExpenseList.description: Represents an archived expense list for a specific month.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ArchivedExpenseList entity.

month.description: The month the archived list is for (e.g., YYYY-MM).

definition.description: Stores employee profiles.  All employees are generally visible, so no specific authorization beyond authentication is needed.

Stores expenses for each employee. Uses path-based ownership based on `employeeId`.  This enables secure 'list' operations restricted to expenses owned by a specific employee. Contains `employeeId` to help with direct queries and filtering.
Stores monthly expense reports. Each document contains `employeeId` and the month for which the report is generated. This facilitates querying and aggregating monthly expenses per employee.

params.name: reportId
params.description: Unique identifier for the monthly report.

definition.description: Stores archived expense lists. Each document contains `month` and an array of `expenseIds`. This allows for easy retrieval of archived expenses for a specific month.

params.name: archiveId
params.description: Unique identifier for the archived expense list.

firestore.reasoning:
This Firestore structure is designed to manage employee data and expenses, incorporating key principles for security, scalability, and maintainability.  It leverages path-based ownership for employee data and employs denormalization to ensure authorization independence when managing expenses. The structure supports QAPs through structural segregation and predictable schema. Specifically:

1.  **Employees Collection (`/employees/{employeeId}`):** Stores employee profiles. This top-level collection simplifies listing all employees. Path-based ownership is used, but since all employees are generally visible, no specific authorization is needed beyond authentication to access the employee list.

2.  **Expenses Subcollection (`/employees/{employeeId}/expenses/{expenseId}`):** Each employee has their own expenses subcollection. The `employeeId` in the path grants implicit ownership. This structure enables secure 'list' operations restricted to a specific employee's expenses, fulfilling the QAPs requirement. The expenses collection also contains `employeeId` to help with direct queries, filtering, and denormalization for aggregation purposes.

3.  **Monthly Reports Collection (`/monthly_reports/{reportId}`):** This collection stores monthly expense reports. Each document contains `employeeId` and the month for which the report is generated. This facilitates querying and aggregating monthly expenses per employee.

4.  **Archived Expense Lists Collection (`/archived_expense_lists/{archiveId}`):** This collection stores archived expense lists. Each document contains `month` and an array of `expenseIds`. This allows for easy retrieval of archived expenses for a specific month.
